chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Criminal Bail Application No.1243 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs 1. For orders on M.A. No.6760/2025 (U/A) 2. For orders on M.A. No.6761/2025 (Exp/A) 3. For hearing of bail application ------------------------- 14.05.2025 Syed Amir Ali Shah Jeelani, advocate for applicant ------------------------------------ Applicants/accused Muhammad Ali Abbas son of Abbas Ali Marchant, Muneeb Mustafa son of Ghulam Mustafa and Ms. Hinozia Abbas Ali Marchant wife of Muneeb Mustafa seek protective bail in FIR No.10122/2024, registered at P.S. Factory Area, District Shekhupura for offence under Sections 406/34, PPC. Learned counsel for the applicants submits that the applicants/accused are innocent and they have been falsely implicated in the aforesaid FIR for mala intentions and ulterior motives; they are law-abiding citizen and intend to surrender before the trial Court concerned but he apprehend their arrest at the hands of local police as such they need some protection to enable to appear before the trial Court concerned. Without touching the merits of the case, protective bail is granted to applicants/accused above named for a period of seven days from today, subject to furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.25,000/- (Rupees twenty five thousand) each and P.R bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the Nazir of this Court. Applicants/accused are directed to surrender before the trial Court concerned in the aforesaid period and join the trial forthwith. This order shall cease to have its effect after expiry of seven days from today or whenever applicants/accused surrender before the trial Court concerned, which one occurs earlier.

Applicants/accused are directed to surrender before the trial Court concerned in the aforesaid period and join the trial forthwith. This order shall cease to have its effect after expiry of seven days from today or whenever applicants/accused surrender before the trial Court concerned, which one occurs earlier. It is made clear, in case, applicants/accused fail to surrender before the trial Court in the aforesaid period, their bail bonds shall stand automatically forfeited. The instant criminal bail application is accordingly disposed of. J U D G E Gulsher/PS
